testimonials.ornament_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 40 16" fill="none" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.6"><path d="M0 8h12M16 8h8M28 8h12"/><circle cx="14" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#c9a84e"/><circle cx="26" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#c9a84e"/></svg>
testimonials.quote: Scriptor has fundamentally changed how I approach research. The bidirectional linking and atomic organization turned my chaotic collection of notes into a proper knowledge graph. It is the closest thing to a second brain I have ever used.
testimonials.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez

testimonials.ornament_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 40 16" fill="none" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.6"><path d="M0 8h12M16 8h8M28 8h12"/><circle cx="14" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#c9a84e"/><circle cx="26" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#c9a84e"/></svg>
testimonials.quote: I have tried every note-taking app in existence. Scriptor is the first that does not get in my way. The dark theme is stunning, the editor is a joy, and the way it handles knowledge connections feels like magic.
testimonials.name: Marcus Chen

testimonials.ornament_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 40 16" fill="none" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.6"><path d="M0 8h12M16 8h8M28 8h12"/><circle cx="14" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#c9a84e"/><circle cx="26" cy="8" r="1.5" fill="#c9a84e"/></svg>
testimonials.quote: As a writer, my notebook is sacred. Scriptor treats it with the reverence it deserves. The typography is gorgeous, the focus mode is unparalleled, and I have never written this much, this consistently.
testimonials.name: Amara Okafor
